  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/domain-groups/{id}/domains"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

🚧 Add domains to a domain group

  title={"Body"}
  body={{"description":"List of domains to add to the group.","required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"domains":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["domains"]},"examples":{"default":{"value":{"domains":["example1.com","example2.com"]}}}}}}}
>
